items.title: Overspender Optimization Program
items.action: Conduct individual reviews with top 3 highest spenders (Yanis Mercier, Ibrahim Haddad, Julie Laurent) to identify workflow inefficiencies and provide targeted training on prompt engineering and tool utilization.
items.expected_effect: Reduce AI spend by 20% for these users, leading to an estimated $10,000 monthly saving.

items.title: Low Adoption Enablement Initiative
items.action: Launch a company-wide workshop series on advanced AI features and use cases, focusing on employees with low adoption scores.
items.expected_effect: Increase overall productivity by 5% across the low adoption group, equivalent to 0.5 FTE productivity lift.

items.title: AI Quality Assurance Protocol
items.action: Implement a peer review or automated quality check system for AI-assisted outputs, starting with identified quality risks like Maxime Dubois.
items.expected_effect: Reduce AI-related bugs by 15% for affected users, improving overall output reliability.
